response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver, and relevant cloud (AWS) and data pipeline work, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his education is only a BS without advanced AI credentials.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Naver
Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks, or enterprise AI deployment
